contexts.context: ...but not for any transports of ecstasy over the <mark>celebrity</mark> in their midst.      What was so "American" about...
...occasion for which the poem was written was a <mark>celebration</mark> of the 20th anniversafry of Weinheber's death, the...
...Kirchstetten, that un-English tract. He had <mark>celebrated</mark> Kirchstetten village, the church where he sang so...
..., and the house he lived.  He had <mark>celebrated</mark> Josef Weinheber, Franz Jägerstätter, Emma Eiermann and...
..., Emma Eiermann and the cats.  He had <mark>celebrated</mark> the whole quiet, unexciting landscape and its war...
..., so it all promises to be a splendid <mark>celebration</mark> of Auden's life and work. I was terribly disappointed...
